response.original_title: 背徳の寝取らせシアタールーム 低俗男たちの醜い肉棒で汚された貞淑妻ー。 舞原聖
response.overview: Five years into our marriage, I recently realized that my love for my wife has its own set of troubles. On the way home from an outing, I witnessed her being groped by a stranger, and since then, a desire to see her cheated on has been growing within me. On our fifth wedding anniversary, I decided to put my plan into action. After dinner, I took my wife to a sleazy movie theater. She gradually spread her legs, exposing herself to the men. I never imagined that she would continue to frequent the theater after that day…
response.title: A theater room of depravity and cuckolding: A chaste wife defiled by the ugly cocks of vulgar men. -  Hijiri Maihara
